key_observations: Complete monolithic frontend scaffold created in single session
package-lock.json is substantial (3079 lines) indicating full dependency resolution
Proper TypeScript configuration separation for build vs source code

patterns_discovered: Modern React 18 stack with TypeScript support
Vite as primary build tool (selected over Webpack/CRA)
Tailwind CSS with PostCSS and Autoprefixer pipeline
React Router v6 for client-side routing
Icon library integration (Lucide React) for UI consistency
Dual TypeScript configs: main application and Vite build system
API proxy configuration expected in vite.config.ts (localhost:8000)
gotchas_discovered: Package-lock.json created without visible node_modules in diff (proper .gitignore prevents tracking)
Vite config with /api proxy to backend referenced in subtask but implementation details not visible in provided diff
Tailwind theme configuration mentioned as copied from prototypes-magic project (external dependency on theme source)
No explicit testing framework included in initial scaffolding (Jest/Vitest not in dependencies)

approach_summary.strategy: Complete frontend scaffolding setup using modern React ecosystem
approach_summary.execution: Single-pass file generation with 11 files covering build, config, styling, and entry points
approach_summary.completeness: All required files present as per subtask specification

recommendations.item: Document vite.config.ts /api proxy configuration for backend communication
Add ESLint and Prettier to devDependencies for code quality and formatting consistency
Integrate Vitest as testing framework aligned with Vite ecosystem
Configure pre-commit hooks (husky) to enforce linting and formatting before commits
Add .env.example file documenting required environment variables (API_URL, etc.)
Review and document bundle splitting strategy for lazy-loaded routes via React Router
